topics.title: Artie Lange's Mock Coming Out
topics.summary: The studio explores a prank where Artie Lange pretended to come out as gay to George Takei during a recorded segment.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Disclosure of Sexual Orientation
topics.summary: The studio records a conversation where Artie Lange discusses his internal struggle with his sexuality, a past sexual encounter with another man, and his plans to come out publicly on the show.

topics.title: George Takei Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with George Takei regarding his career in television, his views on equality, and a comedic segment involving a guest's mock coming-out story.

topics.title: Sirius Stiletto and Animal Consumption
topics.summary: The studio discusses the features of the Sirius Stiletto II device before reacting to a caller's claims about consuming pets from shelters.

topics.title: Elevator Encounter and Wedding Dispute
topics.summary: The studio discusses a humorous elevator interaction between Benjy and Mel Carmison, a proposed cooking show featuring Lisa G., and a heated debate over a plumber's presence at Gary's wedding.

topics.title: Police Sting Operations and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a police sting operation involving decoy wallets in subway stations, political figures like Mike Huckabee and Mitt Romney, and various news stories including a drug-related arrest of a police officer.

topics.title: John Popper and Chan Kenshla Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts John Popper of Blues Traveler and guitarist Chan Kenshla for an in-studio performance of "Imagine" and a discussion regarding Popper's personal life, health, and legal history.

topics.title: Repetitive Dreamer Narrative
topics.summary: The show features a repetitive sequence of phrases regarding being a dreamer and an invitation to join the world.

topics.title: Radio Industry Merger and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential Department of Justice ruling on a satellite radio merger while reacting to listener feedback regarding recent segments and guest appearances.

topics.title: Comedy Special Promotion and Writer Strike Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features guest David Tell promoting his comedy special while the participants discuss the writer's strike, past USO tours in Iraq, and various television show concepts.

topics.title: Saturday Night Live and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses past experiences on Saturday Night Live, the use of racial slurs in media, upcoming stand-up specials, and various celebrity news items including Artie Lange's public statements and personal anecdotes about smoking.

topics.title: Sexual Health Studies and Cultural News
topics.summary: The studio discusses research on the correlation between age of sexual debut and dysfunction, reports on local news including a tiger attack and late-night show staffing, and explores Hanukkah traditions.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including local crime reports, political updates regarding Iran and the presidency, celebrity news involving the Spice Girls and Will Smith, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
